Author: MathDad
Name: Senpan Admin Companion
Description: Serves as an alternative to many of the web-interface functions, allowing staff to operate various systems from within the game.
Punchline: Allows Senpan Tea House staff to use various app services right from the game.
Changelog: The Bingo Game tab now supports auto-run games: a New Game 'Auto-draw numbers' checkbox with a 'Time Between Calls' interval (also on presets), plus a live Auto-Draw on/off toggle and interval selector that stay in sync with the website. The half-time prompt is now driven by the server so it fires for automatic draws too; its Yes/No answer alerts players or resumes auto-draw. Auto-draw pauses at half-time and stops when a winner is found.
